A1.message: I will wait at (0,2) until you pass through the corridor.
A1.justification: Waiting avoids a corridor conflict while A2 moves left toward my goal. Once A2 has passed the corridor cells, I can safely move right toward my goal.

A2.justification: We must avoid a corridor conflict at the next step. By moving right now we leave (4,2) before A1 arrives, and the message encourages A1 to pause at (3,2) so we can safely move back into (4,2) afterward.
